interfaces.name: getHomePageSummary
interfaces.description: Get homepage hero content and featured items (services, projects, plans, articles, testimonials) for the single user.

interfaces.name: getPortfolioFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the portfolio listing page (project types, styles, contexts, room types, ranges, sort options).

interfaces.name: getPortfolioFilterState
interfaces.description: Get the current portfolio filter and sort state for the single user.

interfaces.name: updatePortfolioFilterState
interfaces.description: Update the portfolio filter and sort state for the single user (changes are merged into existing state).

interfaces.name: getPortfolioProjects
interfaces.description: Get a paginated list of projects matching the current portfolio filter state for the single user.

interfaces.name: getProjectDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific project, along with save status and similar projects.

interfaces.name: saveProjectToFavorites
interfaces.description: Save a project to the single user's favorites list (saved items). If already saved, this is a no-op.

interfaces.name: requestSimilarProjectQuote
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a similar project or renovation based on a specific project detail page.

parameters.name: preferred_start_date
parameters.description: Preferred start date as ISO 8601 date string, e.g., '2026-06-03'

interfaces.name: requestProjectInvestorInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit an investor-style inquiry about a specific commercial project from its detail page.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message referencing the project, e.g., 'I am interested in a commercial project similar to [project_name]. Please provide information on timelines and budget.'

interfaces.name: getPlanFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the pre-designed plans listing page.

interfaces.name: getPlanFilterState
interfaces.description: Get the current plans filter and sort state for the single user.

interfaces.name: updatePlanFilterState
interfaces.description: Update the plans filter and sort state for the single user (changes are merged).

interfaces.name: getPlansList
interfaces.description: Get a paginated list of plans matching the current plan filter state for the single user.

interfaces.name: getPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific house plan, including save status and similar plans.

interfaces.name: savePlanToFavorites
interfaces.description: Save a plan to the single user's favorites list (saved items). If already saved, this is a no-op.

interfaces.name: requestPlanConsultation
interfaces.description: Submit a consultation request for a specific plan from its detail page.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Custom message from the user about the plan and desired customization.

interfaces.name: getServicesList
interfaces.description: Get a list of active services (e.g., custom home design, renovations, commercial architecture) for the services page.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific service, including whether it has a cost calculator and related portfolio examples.

interfaces.name: runCostCalculator
interfaces.description: Run the cost calculator for a service (e.g., custom home design) with the provided configuration and return an estimated cost.

interfaces.name: requestDetailedEstimateFromCalculator
interfaces.description: Request a detailed estimate based on an existing cost calculator configuration.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available topic/tag and year filter options for the blog/resources listing page.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterState
interfaces.description: Get the current blog filter and sort state for the single user.

interfaces.name: updateBlogFilterState
interfaces.description: Update the blog filter and sort state for the single user (changes are merged).

interfaces.name: getBlogArticlesList
interfaces.description: Get a paginated list of blog articles matching the current blog filter state for the single user.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific article, including save status and related articles.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save an article to the single user's reading list (saved items). If already saved, this is a no-op.

interfaces.name: getSavedItems
interfaces.description: Get all saved items for the single user, optionally filtered by item type (project, plan, article, testimonial).

interfaces.name: removeSavedItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the single user's saved items list, identified by underlying item type and item id.

interfaces.name: getTestimonialsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the testimonials listing page.

interfaces.name: getTestimonialsFilterState
interfaces.description: Get the current testimonials filter and sort state for the single user.

interfaces.name: updateTestimonialsFilterState
interfaces.description: Update the testimonials filter and sort state for the single user (changes are merged).

interfaces.name: getTestimonialsList
interfaces.description: Get a paginated list of testimonials matching the current testimonials filter state for the single user.

interfaces.name: getTestimonialDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific testimonial, including related project information.

canonical_url.description: Absolute URL constructed from url_slug for sharing purposes.

interfaces.name: trackTestimonialShare
interfaces.description: Record that the user has used the testimonial share or copy-link feature (for analytics and confirmation).

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the contact and consultation page, including supported appointment types and messaging.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry via the contact page, including optional pasted URLs (such as testimonial links).

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: User message; may include pasted URLs referencing testimonials, projects, or plans.

interfaces.name: getConsultationAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for booking an in-studio consultation on a specific date and appointment type.

interfaces.name: bookConsultationAppointment
interfaces.description: Book an in-studio consultation appointment for the single user with a selected datetime and notes.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional project details or notes for the consultation.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including firm history, mission, values, team members, credentials, and awards.

interfaces.name: getProcessPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Our Process page, outlining phases of engagement, expectations, and links to related content.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get frequently asked questions related to costs, timelines, communication, and other topics.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Privacy Policy page, describing data collection, storage, use, and user rights.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfServiceContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Terms of Service page, including acceptable use, limitations of liability, and intellectual property information.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePortfolioFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single user's PortfolioFilterState from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePlanFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single user's PlanFilterState from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateBlogFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single user's BlogFilterState from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateTestimonialFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single user's TestimonialFilterState from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _saveItemInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or update a SavedItem record for the single user given an underlying entity.

helperFunctions.name: _removeItemInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to remove a SavedItem and recalculate remaining counts by type for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateBuildCostInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper implementing the cost estimation algorithm used by the runCostCalculator interface.

helperFunctions.name: _createInquiryRecordInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to construct and persist ProjectInquiry, PlanConsultation, DetailedEstimateRequest, or ContactInquiry records with correct metadata.

helperFunctions.name: _createConsultationBookingInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate availability and create a ConsultationBooking record.
